subscription_tags.name: cost_center
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank. Cost allocation and reporting. Example: XXXXX.

subscription_tags.name: budget_owner
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank. Person or team responsible for cost reporting and alerting. Email address, lowercase.

subscription_tags.name: subscription_owner
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank. Responsible for Subscription. Email address, lowercase.

subscription_tags.name: technical_owner
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank. Architect or Lead for the project/programme. Email address, lowercase.

subscription_tags.name: managed_by
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank.

subscription_tags.name: programme
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank. Programme name to group multiple projects together. No spaces, lowercase.

subscription_tags.name: confidentiality
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank. Security category of the data within the project.

subscription_tags.name: business_unit
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank.

subscription_tags.name: local_market
subscription_tags.guidance: Search the Azure AI knowledge base to determine which local market this application belongs to. Once identified, use the corresponding value from the mapping below. If the local market cannot be determined, leave the value blank.

subscription_tags.name: environment
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank. Environment category. Allowed: mgmt, dev, test, preprod, prod, sandbox.

subscription_tags.name: support_group
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank.

subscription_tags.name: sec_assessment
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank. Security assessment ID.

subscription_tags.name: created
subscription_tags.guidance: Provided automatically by the pipeline. Creation subscription date. Format: dd-mm-yyyy.

subscription_tags.name: service_class
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank. Service class. Allowed: bronze, silver, gold, platinum.

subscription_tags.name: repository
subscription_tags.guidance: Provided automatically by the pipeline. Created by an automation pipeline.

subscription_tags.name: env_local
subscription_tags.guidance: Find the information from the Azure AI search index. If not found, leave the value blank. Local environment for DCC migration. Example: sit, uat, pat.

notes: Wherever the value is to be provided by the customer, the agent should find values from the knowledge base.
